overview: A comprehensive internal management system for car modification and service workshops. Manages the full lifecycle of workshop jobs from creation to completion — with worker assignment, real-time timers, incentive calculations, attendance tracking, in-app notifications, and role-specific dashboards for Admin, Sales Manager, and Workshop Manager.
features: Role-based login for Admin, Sales Manager, and Workshop Manager
Job card creation with auto-generated Job IDs and full status history
Worker profiles with assignment history, incentives, and attendance records
Real-time job timers that persist across page refreshes
Incentive pool calculation with time-weighted distribution and early-finish bonuses
Biometric attendance via CSV import with late/absent/idle flagging
In-app notification centre with configurable templates and unread badge
Role-specific dashboards with live job, worker, and attendance data
Filterable reports with CSV and PDF export for jobs, workers, incentives, and attendance
Full audit log — every action recorded, no deletions
